title: Ainiv Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty, Waterproof Foam Tape Strong Adhesive Mounting Tape, for Picture Hanging Strips Carpet Tape Rug Gripper for LED Strip Light Indoor and Outdoor(5M Length, 20MM Width)
features: 【DOUBLE SIDED TAPE】Our strong double sided mounting tape is 5m in length, 20mm in width and thickness is 1mm, can holds up to 30kg per meter. Designed with fast and easy-to-use permanent bonding method, double sided tape eliminates drilling, grinding, refinishing, screwing, welding and clean-up, which is ideal for mounting tools, strip lights, automotive trim, carpet, posters and picture frames.

【STRONG ADHESIVE MOUNTING TAPE】This double-sided tape is heavy duty strong adhesion.Thick foam tape has excellent shockproof and transformation resistance. Powerful ability to bond a variety of surfaces like ceramic tile, wood floors, drywall, glass, metal. Please waiting for around 24 hours to obtain best bonding strength.

【EASY USING & FREE HANDS】Ainiv foam tape no drilling, no screwing, no heating and is easy for you to install, just peel off the tape and stick it to the surface of the object. And it is easy to reposition when it is not fully compressed and repositioning will not influence adhesion durability, it bonds quickly and securely when it's fully compressed.

【WATERPROOF & DURABLE】The strong adhesive mounting tape is resistant to UV light, moisture, temperature extremes, and chemicals, which can be used indoors or outdoors. This tape is ensuring perfect sealing and bonding even in extreme environments and it is perfect using in home, retail and factory settings.

【VERSATILITY OF USE】The waterproof foam tape with strong adhesive is weatherproof, can be widely used almost anywhere in our daily life, including but not limited to led strip lights, air cushion, motorcycles, cars, led lights, bathroom, solar lights, hook rack, windows, metal street signs, DIY, industrial, hang signs, plastic, picture frames.
description: ✔No glue mark -There will be no traces of tape left to avoid the need to clean or difficult to clean ✔Heavy duty adhesive tapes -The tape with adhesive on two sides, ready to use by tearing off the red backing. ✔Strong tensile property -It won't break easily and can meet the length you want SPECIFICATION： Material：Foam tape Size：5m in length, 20mm in width Thickness：1mm HOW TO USE: 1 Cleaning the surface. 2 Wipe dry the surface. 3. Adhering pressing the tape. 4. Please aiting for around 24 hours to obtain best bonding strength. KIND TIPS: Not recommended for wallpaper, fabric, textured walls, brick and other rough, non-stick surfaces.
